adminForceClose(address).details: For testnet / demo resets only. Absorbs outstanding debt as a protocol loss.

adminHardReset(address).details: PAS collateral is NOT swept (it belongs to borrowers). Call adminForceCloseAll first.

params.tick: 0 = disabled (1x normal), N = Nx accelerated. 60 = 1 sec equals 1 min of interest.

adminTickPool(address[]).details: Capitalises accrued interest into the borrower's principal and resets their clock.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

paused().details: Returns true if the contract is paused, and false otherwise.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

adminBulkWithdrawDeposits(address[]).notice: Force-withdraw USDC deposits for a batch of lenders without the normal liquidity check.

adminForceClose(address).notice: Force-close a position and any pending collateral without debt repayment.

adminForceCloseAll(address[]).notice: Batch force-close PAS positions and return PAS collateral. Absorbs unpaid USDC debt.

adminHardReset(address).notice: Nuclear reset: zero all pool accounting and sweep all USDC to admin.

adminResetUserScore(address).notice: Reset a single user's credit score history.

adminResetUserScores(address[]).notice: Batch-reset credit score history for multiple users.

adminSetGlobalTick(uint256).notice: Set global interest tick multiplier for ALL positions simultaneously.

adminTickPool(address[]).notice: Force-accrue interest for PAS borrowers and distribute USDC to lenders as yield.

globalTick().notice: Global interest tick multiplier applied to ALL positions (0 = disabled = 1x).
